name: Jinjer
description: Cloud HR platform popular with Japanese SMBs — attendance, payroll, workflow; offers data import/export APIs.

seo.title: Jinjer — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Jinjer: Cloud HR platform popular with Japanese SMBs — attendance, payroll, workflow; offers data import/export APIs.

when_to_use: Attendance and payroll automation for Japanese SMBs
Data import/export API integration with payroll vendors
Workflow approval for HR requests in cloud-based system
Multi-location attendance tracking for retail companies
Employee self-service portal for leave and shift management

pros: Attendance, payroll, workflow for JP SMBs
cons: UX can feel fragmented across tools
review.verdict: Pragmatic HR cloud for Japanese SMBs — great locally, no global play.
review.best_for: Japanese SMBs wanting affordable attendance and payroll with basic APIs
review.not_for: Companies operating across multiple countries needing unified global HR
